Speaker 1: Hey, is Rachel here?
Speaker 2: No.
Speaker 1: She's still at dinner?
Speaker 2: I guess. Why? Who's she with?
Speaker 1: That guy Mark. From Bloomingdale's... She thinks he's just being nice to her. But I know he really wants to sleep with her.
Speaker 3: It's seven years ago. My time machine works!
Speaker 1: We ran into him on the street today and he said he might have a job for her. But I know he just wants to get into her pants.
Speaker 2: So what if he wants to sleep with her? I mean, she's single and he's cute.
Speaker 3: Excuse me?
Speaker 2: Oh please! Yesterday on the subway? You couldn't stop staring at that woman with the big breasts the whole time.
Speaker 3: For your information, I was staring at her baby. We're about to be parents.
Speaker 2: Oh, sorry!
